Upon arriving Mr. Alphonza Watson was suffering a gunshot would to his right chest/ stomach area. Mr. Watson was laying on his back on the sidewalk with his head facing west and his feet in the street facing cast. Medic # 16 responded and transported Mr Watson to Johns Hopkins where he was immediately taken to the operating room. At 0544 hours Dr Efron pronounced Mr Watson deceased. City wide shooting responded out still investigating this incident as a shooting. Detective Fuller H089 Unit 3845 on scene. Crime lab Harden Unit 5835 on scene to photograph and recover evidence. Crime scene log maintained by Officer Chanoine J294 3 A42. Unit 5A42 Officer Moorehead followed Medic to Johns Hopkins and recovered and submitted all evidence while at the hospital. Upon being made aware that Mr. Watson was deceased investigation was turned over to Homicide Detective Jackson Unit 6486

Upon arriving Mr. Alphonza Watson was suffering a gunshot would to his right chest/ stomach area. Mr. Watson was laying on his back
on the sidewalk with his head facing west and his feet in the street facing cast. Medic # 16 responded and transported Mr Watson to
Johns Hopkins where he was immediately taken to the operating room. At 0544 hours Dr Efron pronounced Mr Watson deceased.
City wide shooting responded out still investigating this incident as a shooting. Detective Fuller H089 Unit 3845 on scene. Crime lab
Harden Unit 5835 on scene to photograph and recover evidence. Crime scene log maintained by Officer Chanoine J294 3 A42.
Unit 5A42 Officer Moorehead followed Medic to Johns Hopkins and recovered and submitted all evidence while at the hospital. Upon
being made aware that Mr. Watson was deceased investigation was turned over to Homicide Detective Jackson Unit 6486
